sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60062" key="krokh/i+os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κροκ-ήϊος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n60062.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of saffron</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἄνθος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg002.perseus-grc1:178" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Cer.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">178</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
